setup.tryIt: Send a test message from the DingTalk group where the app is installed.
setup.summary: DingTalk needs app credentials from Stream mode.
steps: Create or choose a DingTalk app with Stream mode enabled.
Add Client ID and Client Secret.
Save and enable DingTalk, then send a test message.

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.help: Copy it from DingTalk app credentials.

clientSecret.label: Client Secret
clientSecret.help: Copy it from the same DingTalk app credentials page.
